# MuleSoft Amazon Lambda Connector

> LLM-friendly index for the latest version (1.2) of Amazon Lambda Connector documentation.
> See [Amazon Lambda Connector llms-full.txt](https://docs.mulesoft.com/amazon-lambda-connector/llms-full.txt) for all the Amazon Lambda Connector documentation in one file.

## Content

- [Amazon Lambda Connector 1.2 Examples](https://docs.mulesoft.com/amazon-lambda-connector/latest/amazon-lambda-connector-examples.md)
- [Amazon Lambda Connector 1.2 Reference](https://docs.mulesoft.com/amazon-lambda-connector/latest/amazon-lambda-connector-reference.md)
- [Using Anypoint Studio to Configure Amazon Lambda Connector 1.2](https://docs.mulesoft.com/amazon-lambda-connector/latest/amazon-lambda-connector-studio.md)
- [Amazon Lambda Connector 1.2 - XML and Maven Support](https://docs.mulesoft.com/amazon-lambda-connector/latest/amazon-lambda-connector-xml-maven.md)
- [Amazon Lambda Connector 1.2](https://docs.mulesoft.com/amazon-lambda-connector/latest/index.md)
